Furthermore, regarding the target feature 'Age' (Middle-aged), the voice timbre is that of a young female (approx. 20s-30s), which contradicts the 'middle-aged' requirement, despite the script trying to contextualize age.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 achieves perfect Content Accuracy, reading the specific target text '明天早上，我会去健身房，锻炼身体' (00:00-00:03) without errors or hallucinations. While it is an adult voice, the specific 'middle-aged' characteristic is not clearly distinguishable from a standard young adult TTS voice. model_comparison: Model 2 wins decisively. Model 1 scored 0 because it completely failed the content generation constraint, improvising a paragraph instead of reading the specified sentence. Model 2 followed the content instructions perfectly. In terms of the paralinguistic feature 'Age', Model 2 provided an adult male voice which, while sounding slightly younger than a distinct 'middle-aged' character, is a valid attempt closer to the target than Model 1's young female voice.
